JavaScript test scripts for Object prototype properties, methods, inheritance, and property attributes.

## Folders
- **[15.02.04.01](15.02.04.01/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for verifying Object prototype and constructor properties.
- **[15.02.04.02](15.02.04.02/README.md)**: Tests for the `Object.prototype.toString` method with `undefined`, `null`, empty objects, and numbers.
- **[15.02.04.03](15.02.04.03/README.md)**: Tests for `Object.prototype.toLocaleString` and its equivalence to `toString`.
- **[15.02.04.04](15.02.04.04/README.md)**: Tests for the `valueOf` method on various JavaScript objects and data types.
- **[15.02.04.05](15.02.04.05/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for `hasOwnProperty` method, prototype inheritance, and property ownership.
- **[15.02.04.06](15.02.04.06/README.md)**: Tests for the `isPrototypeOf` method in various JavaScript object scenarios.
- **[15.02.04.07](15.02.04.07/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for property enumerability and non-enumerability using `Object.defineProperty`.

## Files
- **[15.02.04-001.js](15.02.04-001.js.md)**: Tests that the prototype of the prototype of an Object is null.
- **[15.02.04-002.js](15.02.04-002.js.md)**: Tests if the prototype of an object is extensible using `Object.isExtensible`.
